message:
refactor(fcp-manifest): promote capability-ID lint to ManifestError method

Move the capability-ID lint helper (detects embedded hostnames/ports/URLs
in capability IDs) from a private function in new_cmd.rs to a public
method on ManifestError in fcp-manifest. Tighten matching to check for
both capability ID and network_constraints. Surface lint guidance in
manifest fix human-readable output via print_human_report_with_lint().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
